meridian.d: Glass towers and Union flags. Everything is clean, taxed, and watched.

foundry.d: Smoke-stained orbital docks. Cheapest shipyard in the sector — modules 15% off.

solace.d: A crossroads station. Everyone passes through Solace eventually, most owing money.

kestrel.d: Wheat to the horizon and food cheaper than dirt. Folk here don't love the Union.

havens.d: No customs, no questions, no refunds. The Red Sky Syndicate keeps the peace, loosely.

verge.d: Last light before the black. Prices are ugly but so is the alternative.

gate.d: A dead moon that isn't dead. Coordinates that don't appear on any Union chart.
